user.title: Connect to Vikunja
user.description: Enter your Vikunja instance URL and an API token with read permissions.

filters.title: Saved Filters
filters.description: Configure which saved filters to monitor. Each row: filter ID (negative number) and display name. Defaults: -2 (Due in 3 Days), -3 (Overdue), -4 (Due Today).

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach Vikunja. Check the URL and ensure the instance is accessible.
error.invalid_auth: Token rejected. Create a new API token in Vikunja Settings > API Tokens.
error.no_filters: Configure at least one saved filter.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Vikunja instance is already configured.

init.title: Manage Saved Filters
init.description: Add, remove, or modify the saved filters tracked by this integration.
